cases.title: System automatically rejects registration when event is full and waitlist is disabled
preconditions: Event is RegistrationOpen with waitlistEnabled false
Registered participant count equals EventCapacity (event is full)
Registration window is active per BR-02
New participant has no active registration for the event
steps: Invoke registrationService.register(eventId, participantId, actorContext) for a participant with no prior registration
Observe error response and query registration rows and Registered count for the event
cases.expected: System rejects registration automatically without organizer intervention; error code REGISTRATION_REJECTED_FULL returned; no registration row created in an active state (Registered or Waitlisted); Registered count remains at EventCapacity; AC-02b and testing-plan §3 capacity invariant satisfied for rejection path when full and waitlist disabled

cases.title: POST registrations returns REGISTRATION_REJECTED_FULL when full and waitlist disabled
preconditions: Published event with registration opened, capacity 1, waitlistEnabled false
One participant already Registered consuming the sole seat
Second participant has valid JWT and no active registration
Fresh Idempotency-Key header value
steps: POST /api/v1/events/{eventId}/registrations as the second participant with Authorization bearer token
GET /api/v1/events/{eventId}/registration-status for the same participant
cases.expected: POST returns HTTP 422 with error.code REGISTRATION_REJECTED_FULL and user-safe message explaining event is full; no registration row in an active state created for the second participant; GET registration-status shows no active registration; system auto-rejection per FR-09 and AC-02b

cases.title: Capacity rejection persists no active registration row and does not consume a seat
preconditions: Event RegistrationOpen, full capacity, waitlistEnabled false
New registration request passes auth, window, and dedupe checks
steps: Execute registration capacity decision pipeline via registration module for a new participant
Query registration rows for the participant, waitlist_entries, and Registered count
cases.expected: No registration row in an active state (Registered or Waitlisted) for the participant; Registered count unchanged at EventCapacity; no waitlist_entries row created; rejection outcome matches FR-09 behavior without creating an active registration row

cases.title: Participant UI shows full-capacity rejection message when waitlist disabled
preconditions: Event detail page shows open registration with full capacity and waitlist disabled
Participant logged in with no existing registration for the event
At least one other participant already Registered
steps: Navigate to event detail and initiate registration via UI
Observe inline error or toast message after registration action completes
Verify event detail registration status overlay shows no active registration for the participant
cases.expected: UI displays user-safe rejection message consistent with REGISTRATION_REJECTED_FULL; no active registration badge or status shown for the participant; no manual organizer approval step; event detail reflects absence of active registration per FR-09 and FR-10

cases.title: Full event without waitlist yields system auto-rejection at registration step
preconditions: E2E fixture: published event with capacity 1 and waitlistEnabled false
First participant Registered consuming the sole seat
Second participant token and fresh idempotency key
steps: Execute registration step on full event: POST /api/v1/events/{eventId}/registrations for second participant after event is full
Verify rejection response and absence of waitlist or active registration for second participant
cases.expected: Registration rejected with REGISTRATION_REJECTED_FULL; no waitlist entry and no active registration row created; Flow B alternative branch (waitlist disabled) yields rejected outcome instead of waitlist enqueue

cases.title: Rejection when full preserves Registered count at capacity without overflow
preconditions: Event capacity N with exactly N participants in Registered state
waitlistEnabled false
New participant with no active registration
steps: Attempt registrationService.register for the new participant
Query count of Registered participants for the event
cases.expected: Registration rejected with REGISTRATION_REJECTED_FULL; total Registered count remains N (equals EventCapacity); BR-03 and AC-04 invariants hold; no seat consumed and no active registration row created for rejected request

cases.title: Concurrent registrations when full and waitlist disabled all reject without capacity overflow
preconditions: Event capacity 5 with five Registered participants (full)
waitlistEnabled false
Eight distinct participants attempt registration concurrently
Each participant has no prior active registration
steps: Fire concurrent registrationService.register calls from eight participants while event is full and waitlist disabled
Aggregate results and query Registered count
cases.expected: All eight concurrent attempts rejected with REGISTRATION_REJECTED_FULL; Registered count remains exactly 5; no Waitlisted assignments; no additional Registered assignments; no active registration rows created for rejected participants; core scenario matrix capacity under heavy concurrent requests satisfied for rejection path

cases.title: Registration at exact capacity boundary rejects next participant when waitlist disabled
preconditions: Event capacity 2, waitlistEnabled false, zero Registered participants
Three authenticated participants (P1, P2, P3) with no active registrations
steps: POST registrations for P1 and P2 until capacity is filled
POST registration for P3
Verify P1, P2, and P3 responses
cases.expected: P1 and P2 receive state Registered; P3 receives REGISTRATION_REJECTED_FULL rejection with no active registration row; no Waitlisted assignment; FR-09 triggers only after capacity is reached and waitlist is disabled

cases.title: Full event with waitlist enabled does not trigger FR-09 rejection path
preconditions: Event capacity N with N Registered participants
waitlistEnabled true
New participant with no active registration and valid registration window
steps: Attempt registrationService.register for the new participant
Observe assignment outcome
cases.expected: Registration is assigned Waitlisted per FR-08/BR-04; not rejected per FR-09; confirms FR-09 precondition (waitlist disabled) is required

cases.title: Registration outside window does not apply FR-09 full-capacity rejection
preconditions: Event is full with waitlistEnabled false
Current time is before registrationOpenAt or after registrationCloseAt via fixed clock
Participant has no active registration
steps: Attempt registrationService.register for the participant
Observe error code returned
cases.expected: Registration rejected with REGISTRATION_WINDOW_CLOSED; not REGISTRATION_REJECTED_FULL; FR-09 full-capacity rejection not applied when window precondition fails first in validation pipeline

cases.title: Duplicate active registration attempt on full event returns duplicate error not full rejection
preconditions: Event full with waitlistEnabled false
Participant already has active Registered registration for the event
steps: Attempt second registrationService.register for the same participant and event
Observe error code
cases.expected: Second attempt rejected with REGISTRATION_DUPLICATE_ACTIVE; not REGISTRATION_REJECTED_FULL; dedupe check (BR-01) precedes capacity rejection in validation pipeline

cases.title: Full-capacity rejection executes atomically without partial seat or waitlist side effects
preconditions: Event at capacity with waitlistEnabled false
Registration module uses transactional capacity decision pipeline
New participant with no active registration
steps: Attempt registration that triggers REGISTRATION_REJECTED_FULL
Verify transaction rolls back or commits without Registered increment, active registration row, or waitlist insert
cases.expected: Rejection and capacity check complete atomically; Registered count unchanged after operation; no intermediate state where Registered count exceeds capacity; no orphaned waitlist entry or active registration row

cases.title: REGISTRATION_REJECTED_FULL error response includes stable code and user-safe message
preconditions: Event full with waitlistEnabled false
Authenticated participant with no active registration
steps: POST /api/v1/events/{eventId}/registrations and capture error response body
Verify error contract fields: code, message, requestId, timestamp
cases.expected: Response conforms to standard error contract with code REGISTRATION_REJECTED_FULL; message is user-safe and actionable per error handling guidelines; HTTP status 422 per semantic rule violation mapping; no internal stack trace exposed

cases.title: Full-capacity rejection requires no organizer manual approval or intervention
preconditions: Event RegistrationOpen, full capacity, waitlistEnabled false
Only Participant actor initiates registration request; no Organizer Admin or Staff action
steps: Participant invokes registrationService.register without any prior organizer action
Verify automatic rejection outcome
cases.expected: System actor automatically rejects registration per FR-09 functional requirement format (Actor: System); rejection occurs without organizer workflow step and without creating an active registration row

cases.title: Idempotent retry after full rejection returns consistent REGISTRATION_REJECTED_FULL
preconditions: Event full with waitlistEnabled false
Participant authenticated with no prior active registration
Fixed Idempotency-Key value prepared for the register endpoint
steps: POST /api/v1/events/{eventId}/registrations with Idempotency-Key K and receive REGISTRATION_REJECTED_FULL
Repeat POST with the same Idempotency-Key K and identical payload
cases.expected: Both responses return the same REGISTRATION_REJECTED_FULL error with consistent idempotent replay semantics; no active registration row created; Registered count unchanged

cases.title: Capacity rejection error is deterministic for identical inputs
preconditions: Fixed inputs: same eventId, registeredCount=capacity, waitlistEnabled=false, valid window, unique participants
steps: Run capacity decision and rejection path twice with identical preconditions for two different participants
Compare error codes and Registered count outcomes
cases.expected: Both attempts produce REGISTRATION_REJECTED_FULL with same rejection semantics; determinism requirement from validation rules satisfied; same inputs produce same rejection outcome class with no active registration rows

cases.title: OrganizerAdmin and OrganizerStaff denied POST registrations on full waitlist-disabled event
preconditions: Event RegistrationOpen, full capacity, waitlistEnabled false
Valid JWT for OrganizerAdmin (or OrganizerStaff scoped to the event)
Actor has no participant registration for the event
steps: POST /api/v1/events/{eventId}/registrations with OrganizerAdmin bearer token and Idempotency-Key
Repeat POST with OrganizerStaff bearer token for the same event
cases.expected: Both requests return HTTP 403 unauthorized; no registration row is created; Register for event capability is Participant-only per roles-permissions matrix regardless of capacity state

cases.title: Full-capacity rejection leaves participant without active registration state
preconditions: Event RegistrationOpen, registeredCount equals EventCapacity, waitlistEnabled false
Participant has no prior registration row for the event
Registration window open and dedupe checks pass
steps: Invoke registrationService.register for the participant on the full event
Query participant registration state before and after the attempt
cases.expected: beforeState: no active registration for participant; afterState: still no registration row in an active state; rejectRegistration outcome per state machine does not persist Registered or Waitlisted; REGISTRATION_REJECTED_FULL returned

cases.title: Registration with available seats routes to Registered not FR-09 rejection
preconditions: Event RegistrationOpen, registeredCount strictly less than EventCapacity
waitlistEnabled false
Participant has no active registration and registration window is open
steps: Invoke registrationService.register for the participant
Observe resulting registration state transition
cases.expected: Registration transitions Requested to Registered via acceptRegistration; FR-09 rejectRegistration path not taken; confirms full-capacity precondition is required for REGISTRATION_REJECTED_FULL
